reference: The most common cause of pain at the back of the knee is injury. The injury may be very trivial and may not be noticed. Please give a painkiller like ibuprofen two hundred milligrams three times a day for two days and inform me about the condition.
text: The most common cause of pain at the back of the knee is injury. The injury may be very trivial and may not be noticed. Please give a painkiller like ibuprofen two hundred milligrams three times a day for two days and inform me about the condition.
